info.title: markmydeck
info.description: Command-line tool for converting CommonMark markdown files to Microsoft PowerPoint (.pptx) presentations with syntax highlighting support. Part of the MarkMyDeck library suite.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: MarkMyDeck - Convert Markdown to PowerPoint presentations

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert a Markdown file to a PowerPoint presentation
